q.en: What lesson does Poppy learn on picture day?
q.zh: Poppy 在拍照日学到了什么道理？

options.en: Everyone is different, and that is what makes us special
options.zh: 每个人都不一样，而这正是让我们特别的地方

options.en: Never go to the eye doctor
options.zh: 永远不要去看眼科医生

explain.en: Poppy thinks, 'We're all different, she thought. Maybe that's what makes us special. She decided to wear her glasses for the picture.'
explain.zh: Poppy 想：“我们都不一样，也许这正是让我们特别的地方。”她决定戴着眼镜拍照。

q.en: What does 'permanent' mean in the story?
q.zh: 故事中 'permanent'（永久的）是什么意思？

explain.en: The glossary defines permanent as 'lasting or meant to last forever; not changing (p. 6).' Poppy thought her yearbook picture would be 'permanent.'
explain.zh: 词汇表将 permanent 定义为“永久的；不变的（第6页）”。Poppy 认为她的年鉴照片是“永久的”。

q.en: Why did Poppy have to wear a yellow plaid dress?
q.zh: Poppy 为什么不得不穿黄色格子裙？

options.en: Her blue dress shrank in the wash
options.zh: 她的蓝裙子在洗涤中缩水了

explain.en: Poppy 'snatched her blue dress out of the laundry basket... My dress shrank in the wash!' So she wore the yellow plaid dress instead.
explain.zh: Poppy“从洗衣篮里抓起她的蓝裙子……我的裙子洗缩水了！”所以她改穿黄色格子裙。

q.en: What happens to Poppy's beaded necklace?
q.zh: Poppy 的串珠项链发生了什么？

options.en: The clasp snaps and the beads scatter
options.zh: 搭扣崩开，珠子散落一地

explain.en: Poppy 'started to secure the clasp, but something became stuck... Snap! The necklace burst apart, scattering beads around her feet.'
explain.zh: Poppy“开始扣项链搭扣，但卡住了……啪！项链崩开，珠子散落一地。”

q.en: Why does the author show Poppy's classmates with their own problems?
q.zh: 作者为什么要展示 Poppy 的同学各自的问题？

options.en: To show that nobody is perfect and everyone has something they don't like
options.zh: 为了说明没有人是完美的，每个人都有自己的不完美之处

options.en: To prove picture day is canceled
options.zh: 为了证明拍照日取消了

explain.en: Poppy sees Rosa's bandage, Gabe's mismatched socks, Evan's cast, and says, 'I guess we all have something we don't like about our looks. None of us is perfect.'
explain.zh: Poppy 看到 Rosa 的绷带、Gabe 不配对的袜子、Evan 的石膏，并说：“我想我们都有不喜欢自己外表的地方。没有人是完美的。”

explain.en: At 'Dr. Chen's office' Poppy chooses glasses frames; Dr. Chen explains frames hold the lenses.
explain.zh: 在“陈医生办公室”，Poppy 挑选眼镜框；陈医生解释镜框用来固定镜片。

options.en: An image made by light bouncing off something, such as a mirror
options.zh: 光从某物（如镜子）反射形成的图像

explain.en: The glossary defines reflection as 'an image made by light bouncing off something, such as a mirror (p. 4).' Poppy beams at her reflection.
explain.zh: 词汇表将 reflection 定义为“光从某物（如镜子）反射形成的图像（第4页）”。Poppy 对着镜子里的自己微笑。

q.en: What does the photographer whisper to Poppy?
q.zh: 摄影师对 Poppy 轻声说了什么？

options.en: 'Nice glasses,' and she winks from behind her own funky red frames
options.zh: “眼镜真好看，”并在自己那副时髦的红框眼镜后眨了眨眼

explain.en: The photographer 'leaned close and whispered, “Nice glasses.” She winked from behind her own funky red frames.'
explain.zh: 摄影师“凑近轻声说：‘眼镜真好看。’她在自己那副时髦的红框眼镜后眨了眨眼。”

q.en: What did Poppy spill on her dress?
q.zh: Poppy 把什么洒在了裙子上？

explain.en: Poppy 'grabbed a cup of punch and started to gulp it down... you spilled your punch!' leaving a stain.
explain.zh: Poppy“抓起一杯潘趣酒一饮而尽……你把潘趣酒洒了！”留下污渍。

q.en: How does the story end for Poppy?
q.zh: 对 Poppy 来说，故事是如何结尾的？

options.en: She smiles her brightest and decides picture day went even better than planned
options.zh: 她露出最灿烂的笑容，并觉得拍照日比计划的还要好

options.en: She refuses to take the picture

explain.en: Poppy 'smiled her brightest. Picture day hadn't gone the way she had planned. It had gone even better.'
explain.zh: Poppy“露出最灿烂的笑容。拍照日没有按她计划的那样发展，反而更好了。”

prompt.en: Have you ever worried about how you looked in a photo? Write about a time and what you learned.
prompt.zh: 你曾经担心过自己在照片里的样子吗？写一个相关的经历以及你学到了什么。

en: Describe a real or imagined worry about appearance.
Connect it to Poppy's lesson that everyone is different.
zh: 描述一个关于外表真实的或想象的担忧。
把它和 Poppy 的道理——每个人都不一样——联系起来。
